items.title: Abraham Lincoln Playing Guitar 4th July 250th Anniversary T-Shirt
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: abraham, lincoln, playing, guitar, 4th, july, 250th, anniversary. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
